channel.title: Meta on R Computing Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Meta on R Computing Lab

item.title: Welcome to the R Computing Lab Blog
item.description: It’s official! 😁 I have tenure now (as of July 1st), and I want to start writing more about the R side of my work. It’s the part of my research that I enjoy the most, and I want to share it with others. Heck, I even named my lab the R Computing Lab… This blog is a place for me to write about the R packages I maintain, the methods I develop, and the reproducible research practices I use.
